title: justicia ingrata
intro: Justicia ingrata, also known as the bitter justicia or bitter jasmine, is a tropical plant native to the Caribbean and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Justicia ingrata is often made into a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
